name: Chef Freddy's Chicken and Rice Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 large chicken breasts (boneless-skin on or off)
1 can rice (do not use minute rice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the soups, milk, and rice in a 9" x 13" baking pan.
2. Cut the chicken breasts into 4 equal pieces and place them on top of the soup mixture. Season with salt, pepper, and any other preferred seasonings.
3. Bake at 300°F for 2 hours. Garnish as desired and serve.
